name: advanced-code-block
description: Advanced code block highlighting with Shiki.

scripts.build: bun run clean:dist && bun run typecheck && SHIKI_BUILD_ENTRY=main vite build --mode=production
scripts.copy:test-vault: cp dist/*.js tests/obsidian-test-vault/.obsidian/plugins/advanced-code-block/ && cp dist/styles.css tests/obsidian-test-vault/.obsidian/plugins/advanced-code-block/styles.css && cp manifest.json tests/obsidian-test-vault/.obsidian/plugins/advanced-code-block/manifest.json
scripts.build:test: bun run build && bun run copy:test-vault
scripts.test:unit: bun test tests/architecture-boundaries.test.ts tests/beta-version.test.ts tests/block-horizontal-scroll.test.ts tests/codeblock-parser.test.ts tests/live-preview-structure-extension.test.ts tests/render-children.test.ts tests/shiki-token-segments.test.ts tests/source-mode-tokenization-cache.test.ts tests/startup-boundary.test.ts tests/theme-bridge.test.ts tests/wdio-session-errors.test.ts
scripts.test:integration: bun run build && bun run test:artifacts
scripts.test:bdd: bun run build && WDIO_CUCUMBER_TAGS='not @mobile' wdio run ./wdio.conf.mts && WDIO_CUCUMBER_TAGS='@mobile' wdio run ./wdio.mobile.conf.mts
scripts.test:bdd:desktop: bun run build && WDIO_CUCUMBER_TAGS='not @mobile' wdio run ./wdio.conf.mts
scripts.test:bdd:mobile: bun run build && WDIO_CUCUMBER_TAGS='@mobile' wdio run ./wdio.mobile.conf.mts
scripts.test:bdd:scroll: bun run build && WDIO_CUCUMBER_TAGS='@horizontal-scroll and not @mobile' wdio run ./wdio.conf.mts && WDIO_CUCUMBER_TAGS='@horizontal-scroll and @mobile' wdio run ./wdio.mobile.conf.mts
scripts.test:bdd:scroll:debug: bun run build && WDIO_CUCUMBER_TAGS='@horizontal-scroll and not @mobile' WDIO_OBSIDIAN_DEBUG_PAUSE_MS=30000 wdio run ./wdio.conf.mts
scripts.check: bun run format:check && bun run build && bun run lint && bun run test:unit && bun run test:artifacts && bun run bench:startup && bun run bench:startup:mobile
scripts.check:fix: bun run format && bun run typecheck && bun run lint:fix && bun run test

author: Rudimar Ronsoni
